title: 🔥成本严重负偏离
body: 市场进入高赔率定投区。200日定投成本报$77,642，当前价格负偏离-16.9%。AHR999（3D版）跌至0.33，确认处于抄底区间。价格远低于长期均线意味着持有者平均成本锁定在高位，短期抛压枯竭。偏多。左侧筹码何时洗盘结束？
body_en: The market has entered a high-odds DCA zone. The 200-day DCA cost comes in at $77,642, with the current price showing a negative deviation of -16.9%. The AHR999 (3D) has dropped to 0.33, confirming we are in the accumulation zone. Price trading well below long-term moving averages implies average holder costs are locked at highs, meaning short-term selling pressure is exhausted. Bullish. When will the shakeout for left-side chips end?
